name: Caramel Krispie Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 1/4 cup margarine and 4 cups marshmallows together.
2. Add the melted mixture to 4 cups of Rice Krispies and stir until combined.
3. Spread the mixture into a buttered 9 x 13 inch pan.
4. In a separate bowl, melt 14 ounces caramels with 1/4 cup margarine and sweetened condensed milk.
5. Pour the caramel sauce over the Rice Krispie layer in the pan.
6. Refrigerate for 30 to 40 minutes.
7. Prepare another batch of Rice Krispies mixture following steps 1-3.
8. Place the second mixture on top of the caramel layer.
9. Keep refrigerated.
